case_title: SANAE KELLY VS. SPARTAN MOVING SYSTEMS, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-01-2015 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,868.05 FILED BY KELLY, SANAE AS TO DEFENDANT SPARTAN MOVING SYSTEMS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-01-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-01-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-01-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY DUDY KLEIN--OWNER. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SPARTAN MOVING SYSTEMS, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KELLY, SANAE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SPARTAN MOVING SYSTEMS, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
